title: Providers
emptyDescription: Add your first LLM provider to get started.

billing.label: Billing
billing.description: Workspace billing or entitlement is blocking this account right now.

exhausted.label: Exhausted
exhausted.description: This account is signed in, but one of its core quota windows is exhausted.

reauth.label: Reauth
reauth.description: Sign in again to refresh workspace access.

forbidden.label: Forbidden
forbidden.description: This account cannot read upstream quota data.

needs_setup.label: Needs setup
needs_setup.description: Sign in again so GoClaw can restore the ChatGPT account workspace metadata.

retry_later.label: Retry later
retry_later.description: The quota endpoint is temporarily unavailable or rate limited.

unavailable.label: Unavailable
unavailable.description: Quota data is unavailable for this account right now.

form.name: Name *
form.apiKeyEditPlaceholder: Leave as-is or enter new key
form.apiKeySetHint: API key is set. Clear and type a new value to change it.
form.configureOauth: Connect one OpenAI Codex OAuth account.
form.oauthAliasHint: Lowercase alias used in routing and pools.
form.oauthDisplayNameHint: Optional label shown in the dashboard.

delete.title: Delete Provider
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

acp.description: Orchestrate ACP-compatible coding agents as subprocesses. No API key needed.
acp.binaryHint: Path or name of the ACP agent binary (e.g. claude, codex, gemini)
acp.argsHint: Space-separated arguments passed to the binary
acp.idleTTLHint: Kill idle processes after this duration (e.g. 5m, 1h)

oauth.authSuccessfulDesc: This named OpenAI/Codex account is ready to use.
oauth.multiAccountHint: Add more aliases later from an agent pool to enable pooling or round robin.
oauth.aliasRequired: Enter a valid lowercase account alias before starting OpenAI Codex OAuth.
oauth.signInDesc: Sign in with your ChatGPT/Codex subscription. No separate API key needed.
oauth.waiting: Waiting for authentication... Complete sign-in in the opened window.
oauth.remoteVpsHint: After signing in, your browser will try to open
oauth.remoteVpsError: and show a "Can't reach this page" error. That's normal — copy the full URL from the browser address bar and paste it below.

detail.title: Provider Details
detail.oauthConfigDesc: Manage sign-in for this named OpenAI/Codex account
detail.oauthAliasReadonly: OAuth account alias, cannot be changed
detail.enabledDesc: Provider is active and available for agents
detail.oauthAccountUsageDesc: How this alias works within provider-owned OpenAI Codex pooling.
detail.oauthAccountUsageManagedDesc: This alias is currently a pool member managed by {{provider}}.
detail.oauthAccountUsageOwnerDesc: This alias currently owns a reusable pool with {{count}} extra accounts.
detail.oauthQuotaDescription: Latest ChatGPT workspace quota for this account.
detail.oauthPreferredHint: Set an agent's Provider field to this alias to make it the primary OpenAI alias.
detail.oauthProviderDefaultHint: Use the pool defaults below to define the reusable OpenAI Codex routing policy for every agent that points at this alias.
detail.oauthRoutingHint: Agent pages now show the effective pool for that agent, plus whether it inherits these defaults or saves a custom override.
detail.oauthManagedByHint: This alias is managed by provider {{provider}}. Edit pool membership there instead of on this account.
detail.reasoningDefaultsDescription: Set the default reasoning policy for agents using this provider. Final runtime effort is still normalized against each agent's selected model.
detail.reasoningExpertModeDesc: Use provider-owned advanced reasoning defaults when you need efforts such as auto, none, minimal, or xhigh.
detail.reasoningPreviewDescription: Previewing explicit reasoning capability metadata for {{model}}.
detail.reasoningPreviewEmpty: No explicit reasoning-capable models were returned for this provider yet.
detail.codexPoolDefaultsDescription: Define the reusable OpenAI Codex pool owned by this alias for agents that use it as their primary provider.
detail.poolManagedByDescription: This provider is a member of the pool owned by {{owner}}. To change pool settings, go to the pool owner.
detail.oauthDisplayNameRecommendation: Add a display name if you want clearer labels when multiple OpenAI Codex OAuth accounts appear in the pool.
detail.poolActivityDescription: Aggregate runtime activity across all agents using this provider's Codex pool.
detail.poolActivityEmptyDesc: Pool activity will appear here once agents start routing requests through this pool.

embedding.enableDesc: Allow this provider to generate text embeddings for memory, skills, and knowledge graph
embedding.dimensionsHint: GoClaw memory currently stores embeddings in vector(1536). Leave this empty when the model already outputs 1536, or set it to exactly 1536 when the provider supports truncation from larger native dimensions.
embedding.dimensionsInvalid: Only 1536 is currently supported by GoClaw memory.
embedding.apiBaseHint: Override if embedding endpoint differs from the provider's main API base

pricing.title: Model Pricing
pricing.description: Sync OpenRouter prices and override this provider's model costs for usage caps.
pricing.skippedDescription: Usage caps skip subscription and local providers, but prices can still be prepared for later API-based routing.
pricing.emptyOverrides: No pricing overrides for this provider.

reasoning.autoDesc: Ask the model to use its own default reasoning effort
reasoning.noneDesc: Explicitly disable provider reasoning while keeping the advanced contract
reasoning.minimalDesc: Use the smallest supported reasoning effort above none
reasoning.xhighDesc: Use the maximum supported reasoning effort
reasoning.downgradeDesc: Normalize to the nearest supported lower level, or disable when no lower supported level exists
reasoning.provider_defaultDesc: Let the selected model fall back to its own default reasoning effort

pageHint.title: ChatGPT Subscription (OAuth) accounts
pageHint.description: Each alias is one Codex account. Pool owners manage member accounts here, and agent pages only show the effective route.

poolWizard.title: Set Up Pool
poolWizard.description: Combine ChatGPT accounts for automatic failover and load balancing.
poolWizard.selectOwnerHint: The primary account that owns the pool configuration.
poolWizard.selectMembersHint: Select accounts to include in the pool.
poolWizard.noMembers: Select at least one member to create a pool.
